channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 447f996a-7c58-4ce7-9a9e-da80381a45ab
Display name: Policy.Read.Recovery
Description: Read your organization's recovery policy
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/447f996a-7c58-4ce7-9a9e-da80381a45ab

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 94ed018c-a499-47e0-beef-803b93873ece
Display name: UserAuthMethod-ResourceKey.Read.All
Description: Read and write all users' external authentication methods
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/94ed018c-a499-47e0-beef-803b93873ece

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 1bf7461f-222a-4525-9760-f7739228d0f4
Display name: UserAuthMethod-ResourceKey.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and delete all users' external authentication methods
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/1bf7461f-222a-4525-9760-f7739228d0f4
